rationale: All brief elements are present and correct: a #7C5CFF ring with a white rounded-diamond and purple dot mark, a wide bold white NOVA wordmark, and a muted letterspaced 'light the way' tagline, with timing beats matching the brief (empty at 0%, mark plus rising/fading text at 25%, full hold at 50/75%, dim scaled-up fade at 100%). The filmstrip shows a coherent assemble-then-hold-then-fade progression with staggered part arrivals (diamond before the inner dot) and no teleporting, though the subtle hold float and ease quality are hard to confirm at strip scale. Composition is centered and balanced with nothing clipped; the gap between mark and wordmark runs slightly generous relative to the tight tagline spacing. Typography is clean and near broadcast-ready, if somewhat default in flavor, so it would ship with at most a light revision pass.
